events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Moves Like Jagger
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Sir Mick Jagger! Still got the moves, still rocking the world. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched 45 years ago today, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first video ever played.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto our screens, changing music forever with its very first video: The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is not lost on us!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago today, featuring singles like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your standout track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, three days of peace and music, kicked off 57 years ago today in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in history.

events.title: Elvis Presley would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who we lost 49 years ago today. He would have been 91. His music lives on.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi
angles.copy: Remembering the incomparable Jimi Hendrix, who we lost 56 years ago today. He would have been 84. His influence on music is immeasurable.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', 57 years ago today in the UK.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic album cover and timeless tracks – what's your favourite from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that still captivates.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite track he's fronted?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released 55 years ago today in the US.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with so many today.

events.title: The first iPod unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod 25 years ago today, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when you could get '1,000 songs in your pocket'? 25 years ago today, Apple unveiled the first iPod, changing how we listen to music forever.

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the legendary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday John Cleese
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.
